content.question: What is the causal magnitude of the 6/8-year extended tracks specifically versus other selective-admission pathways (standard 4-year gimnaziums, vocational entrance exams, church/private school selection) in producing observed segregation outcomes?
content.reduction_path: Conduct decomposition analysis isolating enrollment flows, demographic composition, and outcome gaps attributable to each admission channel independently; compare counterfactual scenarios removing only extended tracks while holding other selection mechanisms constant
